sections.paragraph:
(for מִיכָיָהוּ “who is like unto Jehovah?” LXX. Μιχαίας), Micah, pr.n.-

(1) a prophet, the sixth in order among the minor prophets, with the cognomen הַמֹּרַשְׁתִּי (which see); Mic 1:1, and Jer 26:18 קרי, where the כתיב has מִיכָיָה.-(2) 2Ch 34:20, for which there is, 2Ki 22:12, מִיכָיָה.-(3) and (4) see מִיכָיָהוּ No. 1 and 2 .-(5) and (6) see מִיכָֽיְהוּ No. 1 and 2 .
